description: Structured analysis produced by an agent step before planning or implementation.

affected_components.description: List of components, modules, or areas affected.

diagnosis.description: Detailed explanation of the current state or problem.

files.description: List of relevant files identified during analysis.

notes.description: Additional observations useful for later steps.

risks.description: Potential risks identified during the analysis.

summary.description: High level summary of the analysis.

title: Agent Analysis Artifact
